task_completion.description: Verify that 'TestSats' and 'OldWeather' modules are deleted, and 'Amateur' module remains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPredict main window, the tabs or module windows for 'TestSats' and 'OldWeather' are no longer present, but the 'Amateur' module is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ground station for Coast Guard Sector Boston is added with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ground station configuration window or list shows 'Boston' (or similar name) with Latitude 42.3541 N, Longitude 71.0488 W (or -71.0488), and Altitude 5m.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ground station for Coast Guard Training Center Cape May is added with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ground station configuration window or list shows 'Cape May' (or similar name) with Latitude 38.9351 N, Longitude 74.9060 W (or -74.9060), and Altitude 3m.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Boston ground station is set as the default in application preferences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Edit -> Preferences -> Ground Stations dialog, the default ground station is set to the newly created Boston station.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new module named 'SARSAT' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab or window titled 'SARSAT' is visible in the GPredict main interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'SARSAT' module contains the five required satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SARSAT' module displays the satellites NOAA 15, NOAA 18, NOAA 19, METOP-B, and METOP-C in its list or radar view.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GPredict application windows, dialogs, and menus being actively used, rather than terminal windows editing configuration files.

integrity.description: The application being interacted with is genuinely GPredict.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard GPredict layout with maps, satellite lists, and radar views, not a text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the GUI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python or bash scripts being executed to modify GPredict's configuration files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target satellites are NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), and METOP-C (NORAD 43689). The coordinates for Boston are 42.3541 N, 71.0488 W (or -71.0488), 5m altitude. The coordinates for Cape May are 38.9351 N, 74.9060 W (or -74.9060), 3m altitude. Note that these coordinates might not point to the exact real-world Coast Guard facilities, but they must match these exact values as per instructions.
